name: KitchenAid 9 Cup Food Processor - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia - KFP0921TSE: Stainless Steel Blades, 3 Speeds
description: Introducing the KitchenAid® 9 Cup Food Processor in Shaded Palm, made by KitchenAid in partnership with Hearth & Hand™. Elevate your everyday meals with the 3 speed options and the ability to chop, shred, slice, knead and puree everything from fresh veggies to cheeses, sauces, baby food, salsa and so much more. The snap-and-go, easy-clean work bowl features a twist-free, one-click assembly and latched lid. In addition to being easy to use, all of the accessories nest easily inside the 9 cup work bowl.
